Titulo: Prosus reaches profitability across all internet ecosystems, core earnings surge up to 28%
Resumen: Prosus reports $7.3B revenue and $1.1B EBITDA for FY2026, with all ecosystems profitable and core EPS up 19-28%.

Titulo: Sabre deploys agentic AI with Linex Travel in landmark industry implementation
Resumen: Sabre and Linex Travel deployed an agentic AI system for corporate travel management, marking a milestone for autonomous booking in the industry.

Titulo: Expedia TAAP launches real-time booking data API access for travel advisors
Resumen: Expedia TAAP releases an API for travel advisors to access real-time booking data, enabling better personalization and itinerary management.

Titulo: Adobe data: AI-referred travel traffic surged 194% in 2026
Resumen: Adobe Analytics reports a 194% YoY surge in travel site visits referred by AI assistants, led by ChatGPT and Google AI Overview.
